curation_notes: Patch commit ced70c17 modifies only src/toodee.rs (plus src/tests.rs which is a test file). Two functions were fixed: insert_row and insert_col. Both had the same vulnerability pattern — after shifting elements via ptr::copy to make room for new entries, the iterator was consumed without safeguards against panics or incorrect ExactSizeIterator::len() values. The fix temporarily reduces the tracked array length before processing the iterator, caps consumed elements with take(), and asserts the expected count. CWE-415 (Double Free) maps correctly to use-after-free, as the advisory explicitly states elements could be freed twice.
